item.title: MiCA enforcement now live in EU; up to 80% of crypto-asset service providers face loss of registration status
CLARITY Act misses July Senate floor vote; August 7 recess sets final deadline for crypto market structure bill
SEC plans to propose crypto safe harbor rule in July, covering token sales and on-chain financial activities
EU begins reviewing MiCA stablecoin provisions including interest ban, reserve requirements, and redemption rights
SEC drafts tokenized stock exemption to allow U.S. equities to settle on blockchain rails
Global stablecoin market cap fell to $312B in June, the largest monthly drop since the TerraUSD collapse
Tokenized equity trading volumes rose 145% to a record $3.86B in the first half of 2026
Kraken applies for full banking license in Lithuania to operate as a regulated EU credit institution
Kraken receives FCA electronic money license, expanding its regulated footprint in the United Kingdom
U.S. agencies evaluating whether strategic Bitcoin reserve falls under Treasury or Commerce Department authority
H1 2026 crypto hacks totaled $972M across 207 incidents, down 58% from $2.3B in H1 2025
Researchers disclose protocol flaw that could have exposed an estimated $70B in crypto assets to theft
SummerFi DeFi protocol exploited through AI automation layer, demonstrating risk above smart contract code
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $4.5B in net outflows in June, their worst month since the January 2024 launch
